financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made a lot more money this year compared to last year, showing strong growth.
Even though they owe more money now, they are still good at managing their cash and investments.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is well-prepared for risks, but political issues with Turkey could affect important airline partnerships.
They have a plan to handle currency changes, but growing too fast might hurt their service quality.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Poor
bullets: The company is not doing well in taking care of social responsibilities.
They need to improve how they treat people and communities.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial performance and future growth plans.
They addressed challenges openly and focused on how they plan to overcome them, which kept the overall tone positive.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company was clear about how it runs and plans its operations but didn't share much about future plans.
Some answers were detailed with data, but others were unclear, especially about future profits and global issues.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing very well financially, and the leaders are confident about the future.
Even with some global challenges, the company is strong and plans to grow in new markets.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: IndiGo is doing well financially, making more money than last year and keeping good profits despite some challenges.
The company is ready for growth with strong cash reserves and plans to expand internationally, but there are some risks with partnerships and leases.
